General guidelines.
   - When you execute commands, always save their logs to files for easier reading if the output becomes large.
   - When running commands, do not set a timeout yourself — let them run as long as needed (default timeout - 2 minutes is more than enough), and once they finish, review the logs in the file.
   - When running sudo commands (especially package installations like apt-get, yum, npm install, etc.), always run them in the background to avoid timeout issues and permission errors when the process needs to be killed. Use the run_in_background parameter or append & to the command.

      Step 5: Report findings with specific errors and line numbers from logs
      This detailed investigation is especially helpful when user mentions CI failures, asks to investigate logs, you see non-passing status, or when finalizing a PR.

      "content": "<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html lang=\"ru\">\n<head>\n    <meta charset=\"utf-8\">\n    <meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0\">\n    <title>Цифровой Двойник Земли - Минеральные Ресурсы</title>\n\n    <!-- Cesium CSS -->\n    <link href=\"https://cesium.com/downloads/cesiumjs/releases/1.112/Build/Cesium/Widgets/widgets.css\" rel=\"stylesheet\">\n\n    <style>\n        * {\n            margin: 0;\n            padding: 0;\n            box-sizing: border-box;\n        }\n\n        body {\n            font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif;\n            overflow: hidden;\n        }\n\n        #cesiumContainer {\n            width: 100vw;\n            height: 100vh;\n        }\n\n        #toolbar {\n            position: absolute;\n            top: 10px;\n            left: 10px;\n            background: rgba(42, 42, 42, 0.9);\n            padding: 15px;\n            border-radius: 8px;\n            color: white;\n            max-width: 300px;\n            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);\n            box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);\n            z-index: 1000;\n        }\n\n        #toolbar h1 {\n            font-size: 18px;\n            margin-bottom: 10px;\n            color: #4FC3F7;\n        }\n\n        #toolbar p {\n            font-size: 12px;\n            margin-bottom: 15px;\n            color: #B0BEC5;\n        }\n\n        .control-group {\n            margin-bottom: 15px;\n        }\n\n        .control-group label {\n            display: block;\n            font-size: 12px;\n            margin-bottom: 5px;\n            color: #CFD8DC;\n        }\n\n        .control-group select,\n        .control-group input {\n            width: 100%;\n            padding: 8px;\n            border: 1px solid #455A64;\n            border-radius: 4px;\n            background: #263238;\n            color: white;\n            font-size: 12px;\n        }\n\n        .control-group button {\n            width: 100%;\n            padding: 10px;\n            border: none;\n            border-radius: 4px;\n            background: #4FC3F7;\n            color: white;\n            font-size: 13px;\n            cursor: pointer;\n            transition: background 0.3s;\n        }\n\n        .control-group button:hover {\n            background: #29B6F6;\n        }\n\n        #stats {\n            position: absolute;\n            bottom: 10px;\n            left: 10px;\n            background: rgba(42, 42, 42, 0.9);\n            padding: 10px 15px;\n            border-radius: 8px;\n            color: white;\n            font-size: 12px;\n            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);\n            box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);\n            z-index: 1000;\n        }\n\n        #loading {\n            position: absolute;\n            top: 50%;\n            left: 50%;\n            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);\n            background: rgba(42, 42, 42, 0.95);\n            padding: 30px 50px;\n            border-radius: 8px;\n            color: white;\n            font-size: 16px;\n            z-index: 2000;\n            text-align: center;\n        }\n\n        .spinner {\n            border: 3px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);\n            border-top: 3px solid #4FC3F7;\n            border-radius: 50%;\n            width: 40px;\n            height: 40px;\n            animation: spin 1s linear infinite;\n            margin: 20px auto 10px;\n        }\n\n        @keyframes spin {\n            0% { transform: rotate(0deg); }\n            100% { transform: rotate(360deg); }\n        }\n\n        .hidden {\n            display: none;\n        }\n    </style>\n</head>\n<body>\n    <div id=\"cesiumContainer\"></div>\n\n    <div id=\"toolbar\">\n        <h1>🌍 Цифровой Двойник Земли</h1>\n        <p>Минеральные ресурсы мира (USGS MRDS)</p>\n\n        <div class=\"control-group\">\n            <label for=\"commodityFilter\">Фильтр по ресурсу:</label>\n            <select id=\"commodityFilter\">\n                <option value=\"\">Все ресурсы</option>\n            </select>\n        </div>\n\n        <div class=\"control-group\">\n            <button id=\"loadDataBtn\">Загрузить данные</button>\n        </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <div id=\"stats\">\n        <div>Отображено точек: <span id=\"pointCount\">0</span></div>\n        <div>Всего в базе: <span id=\"totalCount\">304,613</span></div>\n    </div>\n\n    <div id=\"loading\" class=\"hidden\">\n        <div class=\"spinner\"></div>\n        <div>Загрузка данных...</div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- Cesium JS -->\n    <script src=\"https://cesium.com/downloads/cesiumjs/releases/1.112/Build/Cesium/Cesium.js\"></script>\n\n    <script>\n        // Cesium Ion token (using default token for demo)\n        Cesium.Ion.defaultAccessToken = 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJqdGkiOiJlYWE1OWUxNy1mMWZiLTQzYjYtYTQ0OS1kMWFjYmFkNjc5YzciLCJpZCI6NTc3MzMsImlhdCI6MTYyNzg0NTE4Mn0.XcKpgANiY19MC4bdFUXMVEBToBmqS8kuYpUlxJHYZxk';\n\n        // Initialize the Cesium Viewer\n        const viewer = new Cesium.Viewer('cesiumContainer', {\n            baseLayerPicker: true,\n            geocoder: true,\n            homeButton: true,\n            sceneModePicker: true,\n            navigationHelpButton: true,\n            animation: false,\n            timeline: false,\n            fullscreenButton: true,\n            vrButton: false\n        });\n\n        // Set initial camera position to show the whole Earth\n        viewer.camera.setView({\n            destination: Cesium.Cartesian3.fromDegrees(0, 30, 20000000),\n            orientation: {\n                heading: 0.0,\n                pitch: -Cesium.Math.PI_OVER_TWO,\n                roll: 0.0\n            }\n        });\n\n        // Global variables\n        let allData = null;\n        let currentDataSource = null;\n        let commodities = new Set();\n\n        // Color mapping for different commodities\n        const commodityColors = {\n            'Gold': Cesium.Color.GOLD,\n            'Silver': Cesium.Color.SILVER,\n            'Copper': Cesium.Color.CHOCOLATE,\n            'Iron': Cesium.Color.DARKRED,\n            'Uranium': Cesium.Color.LIME,\n            'Coal': Cesium.Color.BLACK,\n            'Chromium': Cesium.Color.DARKGRAY,\n            'Tungsten': Cesium.Color.GRAY,\n            'Manganese': Cesium.Color.PURPLE,\n            'Mercury': Cesium.Color.LIGHTGRAY,\n            'Tin': Cesium.Color.LIGHTSTEELBLUE,\n            'Lead': Cesium.Color.DARKSLATEGRAY\n        };\n\n        // Function to get color for commodity\n        function getColorForCommodity(commodity) {\n            if (commodityColors[commodity]) {\n                return commodityColors[commodity];\n            }\n            return Cesium.Color.CYAN;\n        }\n\n        // Load GeoJSON data\n        async function loadData() {\n            const loadingDiv = document.getElementById('loading');\n            const loadBtn = document.getElementById('loadDataBtn');\n\n            loadingDiv.classList.remove('hidden');\n            loadBtn.disabled = true;\n\n            try {\n                const response = await fetch('data/mrds.geojson');\n                const geojson = await response.json();\n\n                allData = geojson;\n\n                // Extract unique commodities\n                geojson.features.forEach(feature => {\n                    const commodity = feature.properties.commodity;\n                    if (commodity) {\n                        commodities.add(commodity);\n                    }\n                });\n\n                // Populate commodity filter\n                const select = document.getElementById('commodityFilter');\n                const sortedCommodities = Array.from(commodities).sort();\n                sortedCommodities.forEach(commodity => {\n                    const option = document.createElement('option');\n                    option.value = commodity;\n                    option.textContent = commodity;\n                    select.appendChild(option);\n                });\n\n                // Display all data initially\n                displayData(geojson);\n\n                loadingDiv.classList.add('hidden');\n                loadBtn.textContent = 'Данные загружены';\n\n            } catch (error) {\n                console.error('Error loading data:', error);\n                loadingDiv.textContent = 'Ошибка загрузки данных: ' + error.message;\n                loadBtn.disabled = false;\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Display data on globe\n        function displayData(geojson) {\n            // Remove previous data source if exists\n            if (currentDataSource) {\n                viewer.dataSources.remove(currentDataSource);\n            }\n\n            // Create new data source\n            currentDataSource = new Cesium.CustomDataSource('mrds');\n\n            let displayedCount = 0;\n\n            // Add points to the globe\n            geojson.features.forEach(feature => {\n                const coords = feature.properties;\n                const lon = feature.geometry.coordinates[0];\n                const lat = feature.geometry.coordinates[1];\n                const commodity = coords.commodity || 'Unknown';\n\n                const entity = currentDataSource.entities.add({\n                    position: Cesium.Cartesian3.fromDegrees(lon, lat),\n                    point: {\n                        pixelSize: 5,\n                        color: getColorForCommodity(commodity),\n                        outlineColor: Cesium.Color.WHITE,\n                        outlineWidth: 1\n                    },\n                    description: `\n                        <h3>${coords.name}</h3>\n                        <p><strong>Ресурс:</strong> ${commodity}</p>\n                        ${coords.commodity2 ? `<p><strong>Доп. ресурс:</strong> ${coords.commodity2}</p>` : ''}\n                        ${coords.commodity3 ? `<p><strong>Доп. ресурс:</strong> ${coords.commodity3}</p>` : ''}\n                        <p><strong>Страна:</strong> ${coords.country}</p>\n                        ${coords.state ? `<p><strong>Штат/Регион:</strong> ${coords.state}</p>` : ''}\n                        <p><strong>Статус:</strong> ${coords.dev_status}</p>\n                        ${coords.url ? `<p><a href=\"${coords.url}\" target=\"_blank\">Подробнее</a></p>` : ''}\n                    `\n                });\n\n                displayedCount++;\n            });\n\n            viewer.dataSources.add(currentDataSource);\n\n            // Update stats\n            document.getElementById('pointCount').textContent = displayedCount.toLocaleString('ru-RU');\n        }\n\n        // Filter data by commodity\n        document.getElementById('commodityFilter').addEventListener('change', function(e) {\n            const selectedCommodity = e.target.value;\n\n            if (!allData) return;\n\n            if (selectedCommodity === '') {\n                displayData(allData);\n            } else {\n                const filtered = {\n                    type: 'FeatureCollection',\n                    features: allData.features.filter(f =>\n                        f.properties.commodity === selectedCommodity ||\n                        f.properties.commodity2 === selectedCommodity ||\n                        f.properties.commodity3 === selectedCommodity\n                    )\n                };\n                displayData(filtered);\n            }\n        });\n\n        // Load data button\n        document.getElementById('loadDataBtn').addEventListener('click', loadData);\n\n        // Auto-load data on page load (optional - remove if you want manual loading)\n        window.addEventListener('load', () => {\n            // Uncomment to auto-load:\n            // loadData();\n        });\n    </script>\n</body>\n</html>\n",

Исходные данные в CSV (131 MB)\n    36→- `mrds.geojson` - Конвертированные данные в GeoJSON (107 MB)\n    37→- `mrds.met` - Метаданные USGS\n    38→- `convert_to_geojson.py` - Скрипт конвертации\n    39→- `analyze_mrds.py` - Скрипт анализа данных\n    40→\n    41→## Формат данных\n    42→\n    43→### CSV поля\n    44→\n    45→- `dep_id` - ID месторождения\n    46→- `site_name` - Название месторождения\n    47→- `latitude`, `longitude` - Координаты\n    48→- `country`, `state`, `county` - Локация\n    49→- `commod1`, `commod2`, `commod3` - Основные ресурсы\n    50→- `dev_stat` - Статус разработки\n    51→- `url` - Ссылка на детали USGS\n    52→\n    53→### GeoJSON структура\n    54→\n    55→```json\n    56→{\n    57→  \"type\": \"FeatureCollection\",\n    58→  \"features\": [\n    59→    {\n    60→      \"type\": \"Feature\",\n    61→      \"geometry\": {\n    62→        \"type\": \"Point\",\n    63→        \"coordinates\": [longitude, latitude]\n    64→      },\n    65→      \"properties\": {\n    66→        \"id\": \"...\",\n    67→        \"name\": \"...\",\n    68→        \"commodity\": \"...\",\n    69→        \"country\": \"...\",\n    70→        \"state\": \"...\",\n    71→        \"dev_status\": \"...\",\n    72→        \"url\": \"...\"\n    73→      }\n    74→    }\n    75→  ]\n    76→}\n    77→```\n    78→\n    79→## Статистика\n    80→\n    81→- Всего записей: 304,632\n    82→- Записей с валидными координатами: 304,613\n    83→- Размер CSV: 131 MB\n    84→- Размер GeoJSON: 107 MB\n    85→\n    86→## Источник\n    87→\n    88→**USGS Mineral Resources Data System (MRDS)**\n    89→- URL: https://mrdata.usgs.gov/mrds/\n    90→- Лицензия: Public Domain\n    91→- Версия данных: 2016-03-15\n    92→\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware.     "file": {
      "filePath": "/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1767093612192/data/README.md",
      "content": "# Данные USGS MRDS\n\n## Загрузка данных\n\nДанные не включены в репозиторий из-за большого размера (107 MB для GeoJSON).\n\n### Автоматическая загрузка и конвертация\n\n```bash\n# Скачать данные USGS MRDS\ncurl -L -o data/mrds-csv.zip https://mrdata.usgs.gov/mrds/mrds-csv.zip\n\n# Распаковать\nunzip data/mrds-csv.zip -d data/\n\n# Конвертировать в GeoJSON\npython3 data/convert_to_geojson.py\n```\n\n### Ручная загрузка\n\n1. Перейти на https://mrdata.usgs.gov/mrds/\n2. Скачать файл `mrds-csv.zip` (23 MB)\n3. Распаковать в папку `data/`\n4. Запустить скрипт конвертации:\n\n```bash\npython3 data/convert_to_geojson.py\n```\n\n## Структура данных\n\nПосле загрузки и конвертации в папке `data/` должны быть:\n\n- `mrds.csv` - Исходные данные в CSV (131 MB)\n- `mrds.geojson` - Конвертированные данные в GeoJSON (107 MB)\n- `mrds.met` - Метаданные USGS\n- `convert_to_geojson.py` - Скрипт конвертации\n- `analyze_mrds.py` - Скрипт анализа данных\n\n## Формат данных\n\n### CSV поля\n\n- `dep_id` - ID месторождения\n- `site_name` - Название месторождения\n- `latitude`, `longitude` - Координаты\n- `country`, `state`, `county` - Локация\n- `commod1`, `commod2`, `commod3` - Основные ресурсы\n- `dev_stat` - Статус разработки\n- `url` - Ссылка на детали USGS\n\n### GeoJSON структура\n\n```json\n{\n  \"type\": \"FeatureCollection\",\n  \"features\": [\n    {\n      \"type\": \"Feature\",\n      \"geometry\": {\n        \"type\": \"Point\",\n        \"coordinates\": [longitude, latitude]\n      },\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"id\": \"...\",\n        \"name\": \"...\",\n        \"commodity\": \"...\",\n        \"country\": \"...\",\n        \"state\": \"...\",\n        \"dev_status\": \"...\",\n        \"url\": \"...\"\n      }\n    }\n  ]\n}\n```\n\n## Статистика\n\n- Всего записей: 304,632\n- Записей с валидными координатами: 304,613\n- Размер CSV: 131 MB\n- Размер GeoJSON: 107 MB\n\n## Источник\n\n**USGS Mineral Resources Data System (MRDS)**\n- URL: https://mrdata.usgs.gov/mrds/\n- Лицензия: Public Domain\n- Версия данных: 2016-03-15\n",
      "numLines": 92,
      "startLine": 1,
      "totalLines": 92
    }
  }
}

  "parent_tool_use_id": null,
  "session_id": "af1463d6-30a8-4119-92ff-d25a89bd948a",
  "uuid": "a4a27501-b32b-44ea-be36-5e91347f2b8a",
  "tool_use_result": {
    "type": "text",
    "file": {
      "filePath": "/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1767093612192/data/convert_to_geojson.py",
      "content": "import csv\nimport json\n\nprint(\"Converting MRDS CSV to GeoJSON...\")\n\nfeatures = []\nprocessed = 0\ninvalid = 0\n\nwith open('/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1767036443116/data/mrds.csv', 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='replace') as f:\n    reader = csv.DictReader(f)\n    \n    for row in reader:\n        processed += 1\n        \n        # Only include records with valid coordinates\n        if row.get('latitude') and row.get('longitude'):\n            try:\n                lat = float(row['latitude'])\n                lon = float(row['longitude'])\n                \n                # Validate coordinate ranges\n                if -90 <= lat <= 90 and -180 <= lon <= 180:\n                    # Create GeoJSON feature\n                    feature = {\n                        \"type\": \"Feature\",\n                        \"geometry\": {\n                            \"type\": \"Point\",\n                            \"coordinates\": [lon, lat]\n                        },\n                        \"properties\": {\n                            \"id\": row.get('dep_id', ''),\n                            \"name\": row.get('site_name', 'Unknown'),\n                            \"commodity\": row.get('commod1', ''),\n                            \"commodity2\": row.get('commod2', ''),\n                            \"commodity3\": row.get('commod3', ''),\n                            \"country\": row.get('country', ''),\n                            \"state\": row.get('state', ''),\n                            \"dev_status\": row.get('dev_stat', ''),\n                            \"url\": row.get('url', '')\n                        }\n                    }\n                    features.append(feature)\n                else:\n                    invalid += 1\n            except (ValueError, TypeError):\n                invalid += 1\n        else:\n            invalid += 1\n        \n        # Progress indicator\n        if processed % 50000 == 0:\n            print(f\"Processed {processed} records, valid: {len(features)}, invalid: {invalid}\")\n\n# Create GeoJSON FeatureCollection\ngeojson = {\n    \"type\": \"FeatureCollection\",\n    \"features\": features\n}\n\n# Save to file\noutput_path = '/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1767036443116/data/mrds.geojson'\nwith open(output_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n    json.dump(geojson, f)\n\nprint(f\"\\nConversion complete!\")\nprint(f\"Total records processed: {processed}\")\nprint(f\"Valid features: {len(features)}\")\nprint(f\"Invalid records: {invalid}\")\nprint(f\"Output file: {output_path}\")\nprint(f\"File size: {round(os.path.getsize(output_path) / 1024 / 1024, 2)} MB\")\n\nimport os\n",
      "numLines": 74,
      "startLine": 1,
      "totalLines": 74
    }
  }
}

  "session_id": "af1463d6-30a8-4119-92ff-d25a89bd948a",

  "tool_use_result": {
    "filePath": "/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1767093612192/data/convert_to_geojson.py",
    "oldString": "import csv\nimport json\n\nprint(\"Converting MRDS CSV to GeoJSON...\")\n\nfeatures = []\nprocessed = 0\ninvalid = 0\n\nwith open('/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1767036443116/data/mrds.csv', 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='replace') as f:",
    "newString": "import csv\nimport json\nimport os\n\nprint(\"Converting MRDS CSV to GeoJSON...\")\n\nfeatures = []\nprocessed = 0\ninvalid = 0\n\n# Get the directory where this script is located\nscript_dir = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))\ninput_path = os.path.join(script_dir, 'mrds.csv')\n\nwith open(input_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='replace') as f:",
    "originalFile": "import csv\nimport json\n\nprint(\"Converting MRDS CSV to GeoJSON...\")\n\nfeatures = []\nprocessed = 0\ninvalid = 0\n\nwith open('/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1767036443116/data/mrds.csv', 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='replace') as f:\n    reader = csv.DictReader(f)\n    \n    for row in reader:\n        processed += 1\n        \n        # Only include records with valid coordinates\n        if row.get('latitude') and row.get('longitude'):\n            try:\n                lat = float(row['latitude'])\n                lon = float(row['longitude'])\n                \n                # Validate coordinate ranges\n                if -90 <= lat <= 90 and -180 <= lon <= 180:\n                    # Create GeoJSON feature\n                    feature = {\n                        \"type\": \"Feature\",\n                        \"geometry\": {\n                            \"type\": \"Point\",\n                            \"coordinates\": [lon, lat]\n                        },\n                        \"properties\": {\n                            \"id\": row.get('dep_id', ''),\n                            \"name\": row.get('site_name', 'Unknown'),\n                            \"commodity\": row.get('commod1', ''),\n                            \"commodity2\": row.get('commod2', ''),\n                            \"commodity3\": row.get('commod3', ''),\n                            \"country\": row.get('country', ''),\n                            \"state\": row.get('state', ''),\n                            \"dev_status\": row.get('dev_stat', ''),\n                            \"url\": row.get('url', '')\n                        }\n                    }\n                    features.append(feature)\n                else:\n                    invalid += 1\n            except (ValueError, TypeError):\n                invalid += 1\n        else:\n            invalid += 1\n        \n        # Progress indicator\n        if processed % 50000 == 0:\n            print(f\"Processed {processed} records, valid: {len(features)}, invalid: {invalid}\")\n\n# Create GeoJSON FeatureCollection\ngeojson = {\n    \"type\": \"FeatureCollection\",\n    \"features\": features\n}\n\n# Save to file\noutput_path = '/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1767036443116/data/mrds.geojson'\nwith open(output_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n    json.dump(geojson, f)\n\nprint(f\"\\nConversion complete!\")\nprint(f\"Total records processed: {processed}\")\nprint(f\"Valid features: {len(features)}\")\nprint(f\"Invalid records: {invalid}\")\nprint(f\"Output file: {output_path}\")\nprint(f\"File size: {round(os.path.getsize(output_path) / 1024 / 1024, 2)} MB\")\n\nimport os\n",
    "structuredPatch": [
      {
